brief_summary: Two parallel vertical columns. Left: 65% with a filled steel-blue marker at the floor (Bakeneko65, gateway) and two dashed outline circles at the upper tiers labelled 'gone quiet'. Right: 75% with three filled markers at flagship, mid-wireless, and value tiers (Sonnet 2026, QK75, Rainy 75). A steel-blue migration arrow runs from 65's upper tiers to 75's column. Caption: '65 didn't lose — it found a different role'.
data_sources: 75-percent-default.mdx § 'What 65 percent became instead' — '65% didn't lose. It found a different role. The Bakeneko remains the answer thock gives when a reader asks for a first custom under $200 ... The category that moved was the upper end. Builders whose second or third board used to be a 65 with nicer materials are now buying a 75 with those materials instead'
75-percent-default.mdx § 'What we're watching' — 'the next-tier-up 65 launches have gone quiet relative to their 75 counterparts'
